name: Fast Money
description: Spin up a standalone local-first business app starter, install the Fast Money AI bundle, and open an AI build session in one run.

fields.label: App name
fields.help: Customer-facing name for the generated standalone app.

fields.label: Brief
fields.default: Build a private/local-first listing operations SaaS that turns one source listing into channel-ready drafts, approvals, publishes, refreshes, and performance follow-through.
fields.placeholder: Who is this for and what should it sell?
fields.help: Short product brief for the AI build session.

fields.label: Output path
fields.help: Optional project folder. Blank creates the standalone starter under Synapse's data directory.

fields.label: Pricing model
fields.help: Recommended default is hybrid: base subscription plus AI-heavy usage overage.

fields.label: Include seller portal
fields.help: Create the seller-facing portal shell and navigation.

fields.label: Include ops console
fields.help: Create the ops/admin console shell and workflow dashboard.

fields.label: Include template editor
fields.help: Add a template editor shell when the business needs reusable listing patterns.
